interviewNotes.section1: Consultative sales and warm lead calling background across legal marketing, PE, web/digital. Founded Millionaire Contracts: two-door model (managed rep placement + systems build) for founder-led businesses. Live divisions: law firms, fintech, B2B, solar. Also runs BD and guest pipeline for QL Strategies / Modern Wellness Podcast. Building sales training platform and AI tooling internally.
interviewNotes.section2: Inside knowledge: legal intake (iLawyer, Martino Law Group, Starcast Group), PE deal sourcing (Eads Bridge), sales infrastructure for founder-led businesses (MC core), B2B/SaaS outbound, health and wellness (Medellin Health, McLifestyle). Wellness/QL Strategies is process familiarity only (1 month).
interviewNotes.section3: Six hard-won patterns: ICP never detailed enough; businesses don't know where their customer lives; lead qualification too loose or nonexistent; nobody follows up properly; marketing-sales handoff broken; scripts nonexistent or too rigid. Thread: founders build product without sales infrastructure underneath.
interviewNotes.section4: 70% DM response rate. Warm network across 20 named businesses spanning legal, PE, fintech, B2B SaaS, health/wellness, corporate SA, recruitment, web design, podcast/BD. No community/forum presence - all direct relationship-based. Supreme Renov8 = outreach only, not positioning.
interviewNotes.section5: No paid sales coaching or consulting (Upwork inquiries are free). Inbound Upwork demand for: sales setup, BD, cold/warm calling, scriptwriting. Five revenue leaks identified: broken follow-up (revenue recovery framing), bad websites on referral-dependent service businesses, unscripted pitches that fail at scale, no lead qualification, no pipeline visibility.
interviewNotes.section6: Will work with: growth-minded, adaptable, patient on timelines. Won't work with: rigid, resistant, wants overnight results. Open to blue-collar/white-collar, online/offline, no regional preference.
interviewNotes.section7: Time: 4 hrs/day (~28 hrs/week). Capital: R1,000/month tools. Skills: design 5/5, sales 5/5, SEO 3/5, content 2/5. Target: $50,000/month USD in 12 months.
